summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte (offset 0x19) must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) to take the winning true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type field at input offset 0x19 must hold the exact byte 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE); the branch at pngrtran.c:1947 compares info_ptr->color_type against the constant PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE and the true side fires only on an exact match.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 10 cmplog winner-resolving seeds carry byte 0x03 at offset 0x19 (W bytes = 03(.)x10), so the IHDR color_type equals PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE and the true side at L1947 fires (W T=10 F=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive loser-blocking seeds hold 0x00 or 0x04 at offset 0x19 (L bytes = 00(.)x8 04(.)x2), never the required 0x03, so the equality fails and the false side is taken every time (L T=0 F=10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's CMP interception logs the runtime operand PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE (0x03) of the trace_cmp at L1947, and I2SRandReplace scans the input for the live color_type byte and substitutes 0x03 at offset 0x19, solving an exact-equality roadblock that naive's blind havoc must hit by chance over a 1-in-256 single byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is an equality test of color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE at pngrtran.c:1947.
All winner seeds carry byte 0x03 at offset 0x19 while loser seeds carry 0x00 or 0x04 there.
The winner takes the true side ten of ten times while the loser takes it zero of ten.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L1947  T=10 F=0  T=0 F=10  if (info_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets, enabling exact-match roadblock solving over naive havoc.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator, only blind havoc/token mutation.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3913 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 282c4c4b85d3af6c` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 of the 4-level ancestor chain. Since the decisive pair is cmplog vs naive (naive emits zero dash rows in 6000 samples), this dash row is I2S-exclusive lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in the winner's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE in which naive resolves the branch as fast as cmplog (no cmplog advantage), showing the single-byte exact-equality gate is not what cmplog's I2S substitution is solving.

weakest_evidence_point: The I2S-floor dash row is a lower-bound proxy (the build does not log the literal I2SRandReplace string), so the depth-3 dash ancestor is presumptive rather than definitive proof that the 0x19 byte was set by I2S substitution specifically.
